settings.title: Built on Craft. Driven by Standards.

settings.editor: We are passionate about delivering the finest cuts of meat, prepared with precision, discipline, and a modern craft. Rooted in time-honored butchery standards, every cut is handled to meet uncompromising quality.

Monday - Thursday : 8 AM - 5 PM

Friday - Saturday : 9 AM - 4 PM

Monday : 10 AM - 4 PM

settings.description_text: Only top-grade meats make it to our counter. No shortcuts.
Handled by skilled butchers with years of hands-on experience.
Cut fresh daily to preserve texture, flavor, and quality.
Chosen by chefs, grill masters, and serious meat lovers.

settings.title: Ready to taste meat done the right way?
